title: Turkish Kofte with Chocolate Glaze
description: A unique dessert featuring Turkish kofte filled with a malty, molten chocolate center, served with a rich cocoa glaze.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine malty, molten, romantic, and turkish ingredients. Mix well.
Wrap each kofte with a small amount of the mixture, forming a ball.
Place the kofte on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the kofte are cooked through.
In a separate bowl, whisk together cocoa and 1 tablespoon of water to form a glaze.
Drizzle the glaze over the kofte and serve.
